texto: The third oddity was the surface on which Lawrence was doing his own succussion. It was a huge, black leather-bound King James Bible. Having done three raps on the Bible, his fist clenched around a vial containing a homeopathic remedy made from amethyst, Lawrence looked up. His face said, "I wish you hadn't seen that"."You don't have to use a Bible," he assured me.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Michael Brooks sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “The third oddity was the surface on which Lawrence was doing his own succussion. It was a huge, b…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, homeopathy, science, útil em momentos de humor e science.

texto: There are reasons to doubt that what we call the laws of physics necessarily apply everywhere in the universe—or that they were applicable to every time in its history.

texto: The definitive study of the herd instincts of astronomers has yet to be written, Fernie said, but there are times when we resemble nothing so much as a herd of antelope, heads down in tight formation, thundering with firm determination in a particular direction across the plain. At a given signal from the leader we whirl about, and, with equally firm determination, thunder off in quite a different direction, still in tight parallel formation.(quoting an observation made by astronomer J. Donal Fernie)
explicacao: Citação de Michael Brooks sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The definitive study of the herd instincts of astronomers has yet to be written, Fernie said, but…” articula lideranca, humor, science em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como estudos e science.
